# Upstream Gaia Fixtures

These fixtures are copied from `SiliconEinstein/Gaia` for static LSP regression
tests.

- Source repository: https://github.com/SiliconEinstein/Gaia
- Source commit: `6354a3425fdadcf6f7e5f557dd3bc30f36d3297e`
- Fixture: `examples/galileo-v0-5-gaia`

The fixtures are intentionally small and are analyzed statically. Tests must not
import or execute the target package.
